leadText: Life Dew (Japanese: いのちのしずく Life Droplets) is a non-damaging Water-type move introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Life Dew restores the HP of the user and its allies by 25% of their maximum HP. If an ally has Water Absorb , Storm Drain , or Dry Skin , it will activate and negate this move's effect on it. It affects allies with substitutes but cannot affect a Pokémon in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon in the battle. S V The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move originated as an ACE SPEC Item card in the TCG . Along with Body Press , Life Dew is one of the only Generation VIII moves to be usable in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl .
